song.title: A Whisper of Love
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) How I desire to love You With all my heart So that my spirit is flooded With love for You.
[V2] 2) How I desire to taste The sweetness of love So satisfied in love’s wonderful melody.
[V3] 3) How I desire to know Your most loving Self So my heart can be united With heav’nly love.
[V4] 4) How I desire to fully Belong to You So I will only abide In Your love’s sweet rest.
[V5] 5) How I desire to love You with all my being So I can share in The secret of love fore’er.
[V6] 6) How I desire to mingle With You in love So fully one in The journey of love with You.
song.author: Titus Chu
